title: La stimulation épidurale dans le traitement des douleurs chroniques
study_question: Can epidural stimulation effectively treat chronic pain in failed back surgery syndrome patients?
population_assessed: 20 patients with failed disc syndrome after multiple laminectomies
inclusion_criteria: Failed disc syndrome after multiple laminectomies; willingness to undergo detoxification if drug abuser.
answer_to_study_question: Epidural stimulation showed good results in 50% of cases, especially for unilateral pain. Bilateral pain often failed.
